generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former national security advisor, I've seen firsthand how strategic autonomy keeps us safe. Our allies appreciate when we stand on our own feet - it's not just about burden-sharing, it's about respect. When we rely too much on others, we risk being left behind. Let's invest in our own capabilities and ensure our preparedness isn't compromised by others' priorities. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
